# ==============================================================================
# requirements-dev.txt — Development & Testing Dependencies
# JANGAN install ini di production Railway
# Gunakan untuk: pytest lokal, CI/CD, linting
# ==============================================================================
#
# Install: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
# Run test: pytest
#

# ── Test Framework ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pytest==8.2.0
pytest-asyncio==0.23.6      # Support async/await tests
respx==0.21.1               # Mock httpx HTTP calls (bukan requests!)

# ── Production deps (diperlukan untuk menjalankan kode yang dites) ─────────────
# Uncomment jika belum install dari requirements.txt:
# -r requirements.txt

# ── Optional: Code Quality ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Uncomment untuk linting (tidak wajib untuk test):
# ruff==0.4.4               # Fast linter (pengganti flake8/pylint)
# mypy==1.10.0              # Type checking
# black==24.4.2             # Formatter
